case_title: SCOTT GEORGE BAILEY VS. BAUMAN LANDSCAPE AND CONSTRUCTION, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,731.88 FILED BY BAILEY, SCOTT GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT BAUMAN LANDSCAPE AND CONSTRUCTION, INC. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CONTROLLERS'S OFFICE CLAIMS DIVISION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PEDRO E. ACOSTA-ALVARADO FILED BY DEFENDANT BAUMAN LANDSCAPE AND CONSTRUCTION, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) RYON HAYWARD FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CONTROLLERS'S OFFICE CLAIMS DIVISION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF SCOTT GEORGE BAILEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAUMAN LANDSCAPE AND CONSTRUCTION, INC IS PRESENT BY PEDRO E. ACOSTA-ALVARADO. DEFENDANT CCSF IS PRESENT BY RYON HAYWARD. DEFENDANTS ARE SERVED AND READY TO PROCEED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAILEY, SCOTT GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUMAN LANDSCAPE AND CONSTRUCTION, INC. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CONTROLLERS'S OFFICE CLAIMS DIVISION $5,731.88 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,806.88, DEFENDANT B THE CITY HAS SUBROGATION RIGHTS AGAINST DEFENDANT A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
